source: Statistical depth — k-fold x multi-seed evaluations with paired comparisons

method_definitions.raw_logistic_regression: Logistic regression on standardised raw reflectance.
method_definitions.pca_logistic_regression: Logistic regression on PCA features (n_components capped by sample/feature size).
method_definitions.topic_logistic_regression: Logistic regression on K-dimensional LDA topic mixtures from band-frequency counts.
